text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 372 

PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Pharmacy Coinsurance for 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 2-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the 
Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_2M
